name: brotm-poker
description: Private organizer application for BroTM Poker nights.

scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply brotm-poker --local --config wrangler.local.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply brotm-poker --remote --config wrangler.local.jsonc
